vocab.example: We need to negotiate the price before signing.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần đàm phán giá trước khi ký.

vocab.example: What is the final price for this package?
vocab.example_vi: Giá cuối cùng cho gói này là bao nhiêu?

vocab.example: Please review the terms and conditions carefully.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng xem kỹ các điều khoản và điều kiện.

vocab.example: We offer a bulk discount for large orders.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có giảm giá cho đơn hàng số lượng lớn.

vocab.example: Our standard payment term is thirty days.
vocab.example_vi: Điều khoản thanh toán tiêu chuẩn của chúng tôi là ba mươi ngày.

vocab.meaning_vi: gặp nhau ở điểm trung gian
vocab.example: Let's meet halfway on the price.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy gặp nhau ở mức trung gian về giá.

vocab.example: We can sign the contract next week.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có thể ký hợp đồng vào tuần tới.

vocab.example: We can be flexible on the delivery date.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có thể linh hoạt về ngày giao hàng.

listening.title: Negotiating price and terms with a customer

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Thank you for meeting today. Are you ready to negotiate the price?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. Your final price is a bit higher than our budget.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I understand. Can I ask what budget you had in mind?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: We were hoping for a ten percent bulk discount.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: That's a lot, but let's meet halfway with a five percent discount.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: That could work. What about the payment term?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Our standard payment term is thirty days, but we can be flexible for a long-term partner.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Good. Can you also update the terms and conditions about delivery?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Of course. I'll send the updated contract by tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Perfect. We'll review it and sign this week.

questions.q: What discount does Hoa ask for first?
What discount do they finally agree on?
What is Nam's standard payment term?

shadowing: Are you ready to negotiate the price for this order?
Our final price includes installation and one year of support.
We can offer a bulk discount for orders over one hundred units.
Let's meet halfway and agree on a fair price today.
Please review the terms and conditions before signing the contract.
